context: Tests whether the agent correctly audits an already-installed skill (Mode 3), applies the correct transparency notice, runs all checks, reaches an APPEARS SAFE verdict for a clean skill, and produces a thorough compliance document listing what was and was not reviewed.

checklist.name: APPEARS SAFE verdict
checklist.description: The report states an APPEARS SAFE verdict (no significant issues detected)

checklist.name: Mode 3 transparency notice
checklist.description: The report contains a transparency notice matching Mode 3: states that installed files from the local system were read, treated as data only, and notes that files may have been tampered with prior to audit if installed from untrusted source

checklist.name: A1 Bash checked and noted
checklist.description: The report notes that Bash is present in allowed-tools and evaluates whether it warrants a warning (the skill's description of running git log provides justification, so this may be cleared or flagged at the auditor's discretion — either is acceptable if reasoning is shown)

checklist.name: No scripts found noted
checklist.description: The report states that no bundled scripts were found in scripts/, references/, or assets/ directories (since none are provided)

checklist.name: C-series checks applied
checklist.description: The report documents that SKILL.md content was checked for safety override instructions (C1), false permission claims (C2), and concealment instructions (C3), and found none

checklist.name: D-series checks applied
checklist.description: The report documents that provenance checks (D-series) were considered, even if limited by Mode 3

checklist.name: Frontmatter validated
checklist.description: The report confirms that name, description, and allowed-tools are all present and valid in the SKILL.md frontmatter

checklist.name: What Was Reviewed section
checklist.description: The report lists SKILL.md frontmatter and SKILL.md body in the reviewed section

checklist.name: What Was Not Reviewed section
checklist.description: The report lists runtime behaviour and/or notes that Mode 3 cannot verify pre-install tamper

checklist.name: Static audit reminder
checklist.description: The report includes the standard reminder that a clean audit is not a guarantee of safety

checklist.name: Compliance output file
checklist.description: Output is in a file called compliance-audit.md
